ne sub-divisions or
Bhuktis. While reading the following effects of these sub-periods
you will do well to remember the general principles enunciated
at the beginning of this chapter.
Major Lord — Sun
(/) Bhukli-lord, Sun See the effects of the Sun's Dasa.
(ii) Bhukti-lord Moon Destruction of enemies, end of
sorrow, accession of wealth, agriculture, building of houses,
meeting of friends, water-disease, consumption and fire-accidents.
(Hi) Mars Sickness, ulcers, trouble from enemies, loss of
position and money, enmity with relatives, trouble from the
government.
(iv) Rahu New enemies, theft of money, danger from
poison, loss of sensation, and diseases of eyes and head.
(r) Jupiter Eradication of enemies, acquisition of all
kinds of wealth, worship of Gods and revered persons, earache,
and pulmonary ailment.
(17) Saturn Loss of wealth, separation from children,
illness of wife, heavy expenditure, death of elders, loss of ser-
vants, clothes etc., slovenliness and phlegmatic trouble.
